use_cases: Displaying transient notifications to users after completing an action
Providing feedback for form submissions and async operations
Showing success, error, or informational messages in a non-intrusive manner
Alerting users to background events without interrupting workflow
Stack multiple notifications with automatic positioning and dismissal
ai_summary: A toast notification system from Base UI that manages stacked notifications with swipe-to-dismiss functionality. Features a Provider/Portal/Viewport architecture for portal rendering, staggered positioning based on toast index, and smooth CSS transform transitions. Includes a button trigger to dynamically create toasts with title and description, positioned fixed at the bottom-right of the viewport with responsive sizing.
